meta.description: MECE Field Classification Matrix for all IPK groupware forms

categories.MANDATORY_EXACT: User MUST provide exact value. No inference possible. Wrong value = document rejection.
categories.INFERABLE_HIGH: System auto-fills with >=90% confidence. User can override but rarely needs to.
categories.INFERABLE_MEDIUM: System suggests with 60-89% confidence. Should present suggestion and ask user to confirm.
categories.PROFILE_DEFAULT: Populated from traveler_profiles.json. Soft default — always confirm with user on first use.
categories.FIXED: Constant value across all documents. System fills silently. User never needs to touch.
categories.DERIVED: Calculated deterministically from other fields. No user input needed.

forms_excluded.AppFrm-076 (Travel Report): Only 1 document scraped — insufficient for pattern analysis

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Unique per trip. No pattern to infer.
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must be future date or today

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Unique per trip. Determines nights/days calculation.
Unique per trip. Drives transport/city cascade.
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must match an IPK-recognized venue or organization name

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Assigned by IPK budget system. Cannot be inferred.
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must be valid BC# from budget management system

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Unique per trip. Free-form narrative.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Auto-generate from purpose + destination + dates
INFERABLE_HIGH.override: User can customize but 95% follow standard pattern

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: nights = (end_date - start_date).days; days = nights + 1
Day-trip (0 nights): 20,000 KRW (66%); Overnight (>=1 night): 30,000 KRW (31%)
R&D → 410201; General → 420312. Deterministic from budget_type.
Deterministic lookup from budget_control_no via AJAX cascade
Keyword-based: conference/seminar→type 2 (47%), sampling/visit→type 5 (44%), training→type 3 (4%), presentation→type 4 (2%)

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Seoul → Public Transport (63%); Gyeonggi → Own Vehicle (67%); Out-of-metro → Own Vehicle (80%)
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Split varies by destination. Must present options when ambiguous.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Only for day-trips. No strong pattern — user should specify.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Optional field; 66% of day-trips include it

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Paired with start_time for day-trips.

PROFILE_DEFAULT.note: Shared lab resource. Cards rotate. ALWAYS confirm.

DERIVED.rule: AJAX cascade: destination → province (set by system after city selection)
AJAX cascade: budget_type → available budget codes
oil_price_per_liter × distance_km / fuel_efficiency(10km/L). Only when transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle - Gasoline/Diesel'.

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.condition: transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle - Gasoline' or 'Own Vehicle - Diesel'
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.reason: Current fuel price on travel date. Observed values: 1584, 1668, 1906 KRW/L.
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.validation: Must be current market price. Verifiable against public fuel price data.
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.note: User looks up current oil price; could be auto-fetched from Opinet API

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.condition: transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle - Gasoline' or 'Own Vehicle - Diesel'
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.rule: Naver Maps driving distance from IPK (판교) to destination. Auto-queryable.
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.note: Must attach '거리.pdf' (Naver Maps screenshot) as proof

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.condition: transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle - Gasoline' or 'Own Vehicle - Diesel' AND toll road used
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.reason: Hi-Pass toll amount. Must match receipt.

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: User must choose: Annual (56%), Compensatory (38%), Paternity (4%), Sick (1%)
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must be one of the 4 valid leave types

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Unique per request.
Unique per request.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Template: '{leave_type}, {start_date}~{end_date}, {destination}, {writer_name}'
For Kyuwon Shim: 82% = 'child care'. For others: leave_type name as default.
INFERABLE_HIGH.note: Per-person pattern. High confidence for primary user.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: 69% Seoul, 22% home address. From profile → common_destination.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Only for partial-day leave. Common: 14~17, 15~17, 16~17.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: 81% of cases are partial-day. User must specify exact hours.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Paired with start_hour. Usually 17 (end of workday).

PROFILE_DEFAULT.rule: Kyuwon: Guinam Wee (88%), Juchan Hwang (7%), Sunju Kim (4%)
PROFILE_DEFAULT.note: Suggest top substitute but allow override

PROFILE_DEFAULT.rule: From user profile. Constant per person.
From user profile. Constant per person.

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Actual purchase date. Must match receipt.
Receipt amount excluding VAT. Must match exactly.
VAT amount. Must match receipt.
Total including VAT. Must equal excl_vat + vat.
Card receipt control number. Unique per transaction.
Store/vendor name from receipt.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Template: '[Card] ER_{expense_type}'. 93% follow this pattern.
420421 (Team activities) = 93%. Only deviate for external meetings (420420), commissions (420374), subscriptions (420375).
93% = 'Team activities'. Embedded in account code cell.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Per-writer default from profile. Sol Lee: '4th floor meeting room'. 97% of docs have venue.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Suggest default but user should confirm

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Recurring team members list. 97% of docs have participants.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Attendees vary per meeting — suggest common list, user confirms

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Per-writer default. Sol Lee: 'To discuss what we did and what we will do for projects'.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Should be customized per meeting but default exists

PROFILE_DEFAULT.note: Single budget code for all card expenses in corpus

FIXED.note: Lab-specific card. May change if card is reissued.

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Actual travel date. Must match original travel request.
Actual return date.
Actual venue visited. Should match or refine original request.
Must match the BC# from approved travel request (AppFrm-023).
Free-text detail matching original travel request purpose.
Document number of the corresponding approved AppFrm-023.
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must reference an existing approved travel request

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Template: '[Settlement] {original_travel_request_subject}'
Day-trip (0 nights): 20,000 KRW; Overnight: 30,000 KRW/night
Same keyword-matching as AppFrm-023: conference/seminar(49%), vendor visit(42%), training(3%), presentation(2%)
R&D (84%) vs General (16%). From budget_account_code prefix.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Same city-transport lookup as AppFrm-023. Seoul → Public (65%); Suwon → Own Vehicle (65%); Daejeon → Own Vehicle (85%).
Only for day-trips. 76% of docs include it. No strong time pattern.
Paired with start_time.
Actual receipt amount. Default 0. User provides if applicable.
Actual receipt amount. Default 0 for day-trips.
Actual receipt amount. Default 0.

DERIVED.rule: oil_price_per_liter × distance_km / fuel_efficiency(10km/L). Only when transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle'.
DERIVED.note: Same formula as AppFrm-023. Settlement must match or be <= request amount.

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.condition: transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle - Gasoline' or 'Own Vehicle - Diesel'
CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.reason: Must match the oil price declared in the original travel request (AppFrm-023).

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.rule: Same as travel request. Naver Maps driving distance.

CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE.condition: transport_mode = 'Own Vehicle' AND toll road used

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: From the original overseas travel request approval.
Destination country and city. E.g. 'USA (San Francisco)', 'Vietnam'.
Full name of conference or organization visited.
Narrative description of travel purpose.
Departure date from Korea.
Return date to Korea.
Date of settlement payment.
Daily itinerary table. Each row: from, to, schedule, transportation. Unique per trip.
Daily allowance budget amount. From settlement calculation.
Cash paid for daily allowance.
Food expense budget amount.
Cash paid for food.
Total settled amount. Range: 300K~6.2M KRW.
Amount to reimburse for out-of-pocket expenses.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Template: '[Settlement] {conference_name}'
All 14 docs = 'No'. Default to No.
All 14 docs = 'No'. Default to No.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Present in 79% of docs. Amount varies per trip.
If transport paid by corp card. Variable.
If transport paid out of pocket.
Present in 71% of docs. Variable.
Often paid by corp card.
Only 14% of docs. Visa, insurance etc.
Filename and byte size of attached materials.

PROFILE_DEFAULT.rule: From traveler profile. Present in 93% of docs.
PROFILE_DEFAULT.note: Shared lab resource. Verify before use.

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Document number of the leave being returned (e.g. ARL-260121-02).
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must reference existing approved leave document

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Start date of the leave being returned.
End date of the leave being returned.
Amount actually returned. Format: 'D / H'. E.g. '1 / 0' for full day.
MANDATORY_EXACT.validation: Must not exceed original requested amount

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Reason for returning leave. E.g. 'came back to work', 'hospitalization ended early'.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Template: 'Leave return {return_label} {original_leave_doc}'. E.g. 'Leave return 1day ARL-260121-02'
Look up original leave document to get leave_type. Compensatory (58%), Annual (42%).

DERIVED.rule: Looked up from original leave document

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Free-form title. Common: 'Budget Transfer_{project}' or item name.
Budget account/project code. E.g. NN2512-0001, FS2226-0001.
Full project title for account_no.
Project period. Format: YYYY-MM-DD ~ YYYY-MM-DD.
Source/target budget account + amount rows. 81% have 1 row, 12% have 2.

item_schema.source: Source budget account code and name
item_schema.target: Target budget account code and name

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Budget control number from IPK system.
Reason/purpose for the transfer.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: If target account matches [120312] Tools or [120336] Office devices → require equipment_name, manufacturer, features, price_krw, purchase_purpose. Occurs in ~10% of docs.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Top sources: Reagent & Supplies [410703] (40%), Assay & Test [410705] (19%), Domestic Travel [410201] (13%). Suggest based on writer history.
Top targets: Domestic Travel [410201] (14%), Conferences [410306] (13%), Office devices [410920] (12%). Suggest based on recent activity.

MANDATORY_EXACT.reason: Title of the seminar/event/publication.
Section 1: Why the material is being publicly disclosed.
Date of the seminar/event/submission.
Filename and size of material. E.g. 'slides.pptx (12345678 byte)'.
Name of the conference, seminar, or journal.

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: All 21 docs had this checked. Mandatory acknowledgment — always set to 'on'.
Q4: 76% answered Y. Default to Y.
INFERABLE_HIGH.note: Borderline high/medium — conservative to set Y since it's an affirmation

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Q5: 67% answered N. Default to N.
INFERABLE_HIGH.note: Safe default — if material were confidential, user would know

INFERABLE_HIGH.rule: Q3: 67% answered N. Default to N.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Q1: 33% Y, 19% N, 48% not answered. No strong default — MUST ask user.
INFERABLE_MEDIUM.note: Patent status varies significantly. Never assume.

INFERABLE_MEDIUM.rule: Q2: Only relevant if Q1=N. 86% not answered. Ask only when applicable.

PROFILE_DEFAULT.rule: Name of the presenter/submitter. Default: drafter (logged-in user).

FIXED.note: Boilerplate text about predatory journal awareness

summary.note: CONDITIONAL_OWN_VEHICLE fields (6) only apply when transport_mode = Own Vehicle. Formula: own_car_cost = oil_price × distance_km / fuel_efficiency(10km/L). Required attachments: 거리.pdf (Naver Maps), 하이패스 영수증.

automation_potential.description: Percentage of fields that do NOT require user input

easiest_to_automate: AppFrm-073 (Leave): Only 3 mandatory inputs. 69% auto-fill rate.
AppFrm-020 (Card Expense): 6 mandatory but mostly receipt data. 63% auto-fill.
AppFrm-023 (Travel Request): 6 mandatory inputs. Rich inference rules. 58% auto-fill.
hardest_to_automate: AppFrm-026 (Overseas Settlement): 14 mandatory inputs, complex expense breakdown. Only 30% auto-fill.
AppFrm-039 (Budget Transfer): 7 mandatory + conditional equipment block. Only 21% auto-fill.
